oatmeal-fudge-squares.name: Oatmeal Fudge Squares
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees). Spray a rimmed cookie sheet with cooking spray.
Mix butter, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl with an electric mixer. Add oats, baking mix, and brown sugar; mix to combine.
Stir condensed milk, chocolate chips, margarine, vanilla, and salt in a saucepan over low heat until chocolate chips have melted, 6 to 8 minutes.
Spread 3/4 of the oat mixture onto the prepared baking sheet. Pour the chocolate mixture over the top. Place small pieces of the remaining oat mixture randomly over the chocolate.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, 15 to 20 minutes. Let cool before cutting into squares.

one-pot-chicken-65.name: One Pot Chicken 65
instructions: In a large bowl, mix chicken cubes, egg white, ginger garlic paste, salt, turmeric, red chilli, black pepper, garam masala, cumin coriander powder, red food coloring, lemon juice, chopped coriander leaves, corn flour and all purpose flour and set aside for 20 minutes.
Mix yogurt and all the sauces in a bowl and set aside.
Heat oil on medium heat in a saucepan or pot. Add the green chillies and curry leaves, then add the chicken. Flip after 5-6 minutes, searing both sides. Cook for 5-6 minutes.
Add yogurt and sauces mixture and stir well. Cook for 5 minutes, then add water and cook on low flame for 10 minutes or until oil separates from the sides.
Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

one-pot-enchilada-rice.name: One-pot Enchilada Rice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400ºF (200ºC).
Heat the oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic and onion to the skillet and stir until the garlic is slightly golden and the onion has softened.
Add the bell pepper and sauté for 2-3 minutes, or until softened.
Add the tomatoes and sauté for 1 minute. Remove the sautéed vegetables from the pan and set aside.
Pour the water into the skillet and bring to a boil.
Add the rice and stir for 12-15 minutes, until the rice is fluffier but just slightly tender.
Stir in the sautéed vegetables and black beans.
Add the cilantro, tomato sauce, chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine. Sprinkle the cheese on top, if using.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the rice is tender and the cheese is melted and bubbling.
Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and avocado (optional).
Enjoy!

open-pies-with-vegetables-and-cream-chee.name: Open Pies With Vegetables And Cream Cheese
open-pies-with-vegetables-and-cream-chee.original_name: Ανοιχτές πίτες µε λαχανικά και τυρί κρέμα

ingredients.item: 1 red or yellow pepper in frame
1 dry onion cut into small frames
A little chopped fresh basil or mint or oregano
1 red or yellow pepper in frame
1 dry onion cut into small frames
A little chopped fresh basil or mint or oregano

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep pan and sauté the onion for 3 to 4 minutes to become transparent, but without getting golden.
Add the pepper, eggplant and pumpkin and leave them for a few minutes to wilt.
Salt and pepper.
Open the leaves on the counter and cut them in half.
With a knife or the special wheel remove the corners and give them a round shape.
Rub some sauce in the middle of each leaf.
Balance the cooked vegetables and tomatoes and sprinkle with the spice.
Add a spoonful of cream to the center of each pie.
Raise each leaf around and fold it in, making open pits.
Place them in oily sheet and bake for about 40 minutes at 180.3.3. until the sheet is browned.
Warm or cold are perfect!

orange-coscoroes-teleculinaria.name: Orange Coscorons
instructions: Put the margarine in a pan, add the water and the orange shaving, take it to the fire, boil and remove it from the fire.

Place the flour with the yeast on the counter, mix and open a cavity in half. Gather the previous preparation, slowly and always crushing very well. Then add the egg and orange juice and knead again very well until it becomes a very smooth and homogeneous mass. Place it in a bowl, cover it with a damp cloth and let it rest for 15 minutes.

Remove pieces of dough, extend them on a flour-sprinkled bench until they are too thin, cut them into triangles or rectangles and cut them, as you see in the photo. Then take them to fry in oil, a few at a time, until they are very golden and crispy, remove them and put them on absorbent paper. Then pass them a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve.

orange-mousse-lezzet.name: Orange Mousse
instructions: 1. Heat the orange juice and grated orange peel without boiling in a container.
2.   Wrap yellows in dust with sugar until you become a foam.
3. Add the hot orange juice by eating the clay.
4. Cook the mixture into a pot and stirring constantly.
5. Take the pot from fire and add the leaf gelatin.
6. Mix and cool until mole.
7. Add milk cream to whip and cold mixture.
8. Wait for 3 hours until the mixture you prepared is poured into a deep heart and joined in the refrigerator.
9. Boil eight spoon juice with 1 cup of powder sugar.
10. Take fire when it comes to a dark syrup consistency.
11. Peel and remove the shells of 2 oranges.
12. Skip slices of hot syrup and leave for 5 minutes.
12. August Take Kevgirle on a separate tab.
14 July Reverse the Musu service plate and decorate it around with orange slices you expect in the syrup.
15. Serve coconut serpip cold.

orange-pound-cake.name: Orange Pound Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt).
Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl; set aside.

Beat white sugar and butter together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Beat in eggs one at a time, then beat in vanilla extract and orange zest. Add flour alternately with sour cream in 3 additions, beginning and ending with flour. Beat until smooth. Scrape the sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour and 15 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then unmold the cake onto the wire rack to cool completely.

While the cake is cooling, bring orange juice, sugar, and orange zest to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and cook until syrupy, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time. Drizzle warm syrup over cake slices.

oven-roasted-turkey-breast.name: Oven-roasted Turkey Breast

ingredients.item: Salt-free garlic and herb seasoning blend
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix 1/4 cup butter, garlic, paprika, Italian seasoning, garlic and herb seasoning, salt, and black pepper together in a bowl.

Place turkey breast with skin-side up into a roasting pan. Loosen skin with your fingers; brush 1/2 of the butter mixture over the turkey breast and underneath the skin. Reserve remaining butter mixture. Tent turkey breast loosely with aluminum foil.

Roast in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Baste with remaining butter mixture and return to oven until juices run clear and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the breast reads 74°C (74°C), about 30 minutes more. Transfer turkey breast to a cutting board and let rest for 10 to 15 minutes.

While turkey is resting, transfer pan drippings to a skillet. Skim off excess grease, leaving about 1 tablespoon in skillet. Place skillet over low heat; cook and stir shallot in turkey grease until opaque, about 5 minutes.

Melt 1 tablespoon butter in skillet with shallot and whisk in white wine, scraping any browned bits of food from skillet. Whisk in chicken stock and flour until smooth. Bring to a simmer, whisking constantly, until thickened. For a creamier, lighter gravy, whisk in half-and-half.
Slice turkey and serve hot with gravy. Enjoy!

oystertini.name: Oystertini
instructions: Pour the gin and oyster liquor into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and let sit for 30 seconds, or longer for a weaker drink.
Run the lemon peel around the rim of a martini glass. Strain the gin into the glass, then twist the peel over the glass to release a drop of lemon oil.
Drop in the oyster and serve.
